creator: jaco@teaser.fr
text:
>>>>> "David" == David W Chapman <dwcjr@inethouston.net> writes:

David> Does this still exist as a problem, this pr would have been for
David> the 1999 stable versions.

Not sure about what you mean but the lack of rmail installation in
postfix ports is easy to check: the postfix rmail script doesn't still
appear in the /usr/ports/postfix/Makefile nor in
/usr/ports/postfix-current/Makefile.
-- 
Éric Jacoboni, né il y a 1295477045 secondes
